requirement_topic.en: Cybersecurity Requirements for Wireless and IoT Devices
requirement_topic.zh: 无线及物联网设备网络安全要求
requirement_topic.zht: 無線及物聯網裝置網路安全要求

summary.en: Timor-Leste currently has no formal, product-level cybersecurity type approval or certification framework for wireless and IoT devices equivalent to the EU's Radio Equipment Directive (RED) cybersecurity delegated acts, the UK PSTI Act, or Singapore's Cybersecurity Labelling Scheme (CLS). Law No. 3/2021 on Electronic Communications addresses network integrity and security at a general level but does not mandate device-level cybersecurity testing or certification as a condition of market entry for wireless or IoT devices as of the time of writing. ANACOM has limited regulatory enforcement capacity given Timor-Leste's very small market size and nascent regulatory infrastructure. In the absence of a formal mandatory cybersecurity certification requirement, exporters and importers are advised to follow internationally recognised baseline security standards (e.g., ETSI EN 303 645 for consumer IoT cybersecurity, or equivalent ITU-T recommendations) as a matter of due diligence. The absence of a formal framework does not confer immunity from general civil or criminal liability arising from insecure devices causing harm to Timorese users or networks.
summary.zh: 东帝汶目前没有针对无线及物联网设备的正式产品级网络安全型号认证或认证框架，相当于欧盟无线电设备指令（RED）网络安全授权法案、英国PSTI法案或新加坡网络安全标签计划（CLS）的制度。《2021年第3号电子通信法》在一般层面涉及网络完整性和安全性，但截至撰写时，并不将设备级网络安全测试或认证作为无线或物联网设备市场准入的条件。鉴于东帝汶市场规模极小、监管基础设施尚处起步阶段，ANACOM的监管执法能力有限。在没有正式强制网络安全认证要求的情况下，建议出口商和进口商遵循国际认可的基线安全标准（如消费物联网网络安全ETSI EN 303 645或等效ITU-T建议书），以尽职尽责。缺乏正式框架并不免除因不安全设备对东帝汶用户或网络造成损害而产生的一般民事或刑事责任。
summary.zht: 東帝汶目前沒有針對無線及物聯網裝置的正式產品級網路安全型號認證或認證框架，相當於歐盟無線電設備指令（RED）網路安全授權法案、英國PSTI法案或新加坡網路安全標籤計畫（CLS）的制度。《2021年第3號電子通信法》在一般層面涉及網路完整性和安全性，但截至撰寫時，並不將裝置級網路安全測試或認證作為無線或物聯網裝置市場准入的條件。鑒於東帝汶市場規模極小、監管基礎設施尚處起步階段，ANACOM的監管執法能力有限。在沒有正式強制網路安全認證要求的情況下，建議出口商和進口商遵循國際認可的基準安全標準（如消費物聯網網路安全ETSI EN 303 645或等效ITU-T建議書），以盡職盡責。缺乏正式框架並不免除因不安全裝置對東帝汶用戶或網路造成損害而產生的一般民事或刑事責任。

standards_or_laws: Law No. 3/2021 on Electronic Communications — Timor-Leste (general network security provisions; no specific device-level cybersecurity certification mandate identified as of 2026-06-17)
ETSI EN 303 645 — Cyber Security for Consumer Internet of Things: Baseline Requirements (international best-practice standard, not mandated in Timor-Leste but widely referenced)
ITU-T X.805 — Security architecture for systems providing end-to-end communications (ITU member state framework)
ITU-T X.1051 — Information security management guidelines for telecommunications (ITU recommendation)

summary.en: China has a network security and cybersecurity regulatory framework under the Cybersecurity Law (CSL, 2017), Data Security Law (DSL, 2021), and Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL, 2021), administered by CAC (Cyberspace Administration of China). For network-connected devices, MIIT Network Access License (NAL) requirements include basic security parameters. The MIIT also administers mandatory security certification for specific categories of network equipment under the Network Product Security Certification (MLPS-aligned). Chinese cybersecurity regulations (CSL/DSL/PIPL) are domestic-market obligations and are not required or recognised by Timor-Leste ANACOM. There is no mutual recognition of Chinese cybersecurity certifications in Timor-Leste.
summary.zh: 中国依据2017年《网络安全法》（CSL）、2021年《数据安全法》（DSL）及2021年《个人信息保护法》（PIPL）建立了网络安全监管框架，由国家互联网信息办公室（CAC）主管。对于联网设备，MIIT进网许可（NAL）要求包含基本安全参数。MIIT还依据与等级保护（MLPS）对标的网络产品安全认证，对特定类别网络设备实施强制安全认证。中国网络安全法规（CSL/DSL/PIPL）属于国内市场义务，不被东帝汶ANACOM要求或承认。中国网络安全认证在东帝汶不存在相互认可。
summary.zht: 中國依據2017年《網路安全法》（CSL）、2021年《數據安全法》（DSL）及2021年《個人資訊保護法》（PIPL）建立了網路安全監管框架，由國家互聯網信息辦公室（CAC）主管。對於聯網裝置，MIIT進網許可（NAL）要求包含基本安全參數。MIIT還依據與等級保護（MLPS）對標的網路產品安全認證，對特定類別網路設備實施強制安全認證。中國網路安全法規（CSL/DSL/PIPL）屬於國內市場義務，不被東帝汶ANACOM要求或承認。中國網路安全認證在東帝汶不存在相互認可。

standards_or_laws: Cybersecurity Law of the PRC (CSL, 2017) — administered by CAC
Data Security Law of the PRC (DSL, 2021)
Personal Information Protection Law of the PRC (PIPL, 2021)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — includes baseline security parameters for network-connected terminal equipment
GB/T 22239 — Information security technology — Baseline for classified protection of cybersecurity (MLPS 2.0)

gap.en: Timor-Leste has no formal mandatory device-level cybersecurity certification requirement for wireless or IoT devices as of 2026-06-17. Chinese cybersecurity certifications (CSL/MLPS/NAL security parameters) are not recognised in Timor-Leste and are domestic-market obligations only. In the absence of a formal Timorese cybersecurity certification mandate, the practical gap is low in terms of mandatory compliance burden, but exporters and importers bear responsibility for ensuring devices do not cause harm to Timorese users or networks. Following ETSI EN 303 645 baseline IoT security requirements is recommended as best practice. Monitor ANACOM for future cybersecurity regulation developments, as Timor-Leste's regulatory framework is still maturing.
gap.zh: 截至2026年6月17日，东帝汶对无线或物联网设备没有正式的强制设备级网络安全认证要求。中国网络安全认证（CSL/MLPS/NAL安全参数）在东帝汶不被承认，仅为国内市场义务。在没有正式东帝汶网络安全认证要求的情况下，强制合规负担的实际差距较低，但出口商和进口商须承担确保设备不对东帝汶用户或网络造成损害的责任。建议遵循ETSI EN 303 645基线物联网安全要求作为最佳实践。应持续关注ANACOM未来网络安全法规动态，因东帝汶监管框架仍在完善中。
gap.zht: 截至2026年6月17日，東帝汶對無線或物聯網裝置沒有正式的強制裝置級網路安全認證要求。中國網路安全認證（CSL/MLPS/NAL安全參數）在東帝汶不被承認，僅為國內市場義務。在沒有正式東帝汶網路安全認證要求的情況下，強制合規負擔的實際差距較低，但出口商和進口商須承擔確保裝置不對東帝汶用戶或網路造成損害的責任。建議遵循ETSI EN 303 645基準物聯網安全要求作為最佳實踐。應持續關注ANACOM未來網路安全法規動態，因東帝汶監管框架仍在完善中。

mandatory_status.target: Not mandatory (as of 2026-06-17) — no formal device-level cybersecurity certification requirement identified for wireless or IoT devices under Timor-Leste law; general network security obligations apply under Law No. 3/2021; best practice compliance with ETSI EN 303 645 or equivalent recommended
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (for domestic China market) — CSL, MLPS 2.0 (GB/T 22239) network security obligations; MIIT NAL security parameters for network-connected terminal equipment; CAC administration; not applicable to export market obligations

source.publisher: ANACOM — Autoridade Nacional das Comunicações, Timor-Leste

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Timor-Leste has no formal mandatory device-level cybersecurity certification requirement for wireless or IoT devices as of 2026-06-17. Chinese cybersecurity certifications are not recognised in Timor-Leste. Exporters and importers are advised to follow ETSI EN 303 645 baseline IoT security standards as best practice and to monitor ANACOM for future regulatory developments as Timor-Leste's electronic communications framework matures.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至2026年6月17日，东帝汶对无线或物联网设备没有正式的强制设备级网络安全认证要求。中国网络安全认证在东帝汶不被承认。建议出口商和进口商遵循ETSI EN 303 645基线物联网安全标准作为最佳实践，并持续关注ANACOM动态，随着东帝汶电子通信框架日趋完善，相关法规可能出现变化。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至2026年6月17日，東帝汶對無線或物聯網裝置沒有正式的強制裝置級網路安全認證要求。中國網路安全認證在東帝汶不被承認。建議出口商和進口商遵循ETSI EN 303 645基準物聯網安全標準作為最佳實踐，並持續關注ANACOM動態，隨著東帝汶電子通信框架日趨完善，相關法規可能出現變化。
